options.command: tsc -p apps/report-api/tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p apps/report-api/tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/out-tsc/report-api/libs/report-definitions/simple-sales-summary/template-assets dist/out-tsc/report-api/libs/report-definitions/simple-sales-summary-xlsx/template-assets && cp libs/report-definitions/simple-sales-summary/template-assets/*.xlsx dist/out-tsc/report-api/libs/report-definitions/simple-sales-summary/template-assets/ && cp libs/report-definitions/simple-sales-summary-xlsx/template-assets/*.xlsx dist/out-tsc/report-api/libs/report-definitions/simple-sales-summary-xlsx/template-assets/
